content:
from Week 5 Discussion
22 hours ago
Rabia Malik
Hey Laura I really enjoyed your analysis of A Worn Path! Your insights into the symbolism of the worn path, barbed wire, and pheasant beautifully highlight Phoenix's unwavering determination and deep love for her grandson. Your interpretation of the barbed wire as a symbol of life's obstacles and Phoenix's refusal to be defeated is particularly compelling. Additionally, your view of the pheasant as a symbol of hope and the elusive rewards Phoenix seeks adds depth to her character. Well done!

from Week 5 Discussion

Rabia Malik
Jamie--I really liked your take on A Worn Path. The "worn path" as a symbol of Phoenix's emotional journey is spot on. Your interpretation of the thorn bush representing life's challenges and Phoenix's determination to overcome them adds depth to her character. Well done!
